title: Top Travellers
description: Report name and total distance travelled for each user. Users who never travelled count as 0.
constraints: id is the primary key of Users
id is the primary key of Rides
user_id in Rides is a foreign key referencing Users.id
Users with no rides must appear with travelled_distance = 0
Result ordered by travelled_distance DESC, name ASC
key_concept: LEFT JOIN to include users with no trips + IFNULL for NULL sum. GROUP BY + ORDER BY multiple columns.

hints.L1: LEFT JOIN to include users with no rides. SUM(distance) with IFNULL(..., 0).
hints.L2: GROUP BY u.id, ORDER BY SUM(distance) DESC, u.name ASC
hints.L3: SELECT u.name, IFNULL(SUM(r.distance), 0) AS travelled_distance FROM Users u LEFT JOIN Rides r ON u.id = r.user_id GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY travelled_distance DESC, u.name ASC

optimal_solution:
SELECT u.name, IFNULL(SUM(r.distance), 0) AS travelled_distance
FROM Users u LEFT JOIN Rides r ON u.id = r.user_id
GROUP BY u.id
ORDER BY travelled_distance DESC, u.name ASC;
